zh.Great Moulton, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 莫爾頓
zh.South Mimms, Middlesex, England: 英國英格蘭米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh.lifeSummary: Henry Teyes是Henry Tyeys的兒子，於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格亞特 莫爾頓。他於1207年與Mrs. Isabel Tyeys在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1216年之後在英國英格蘭米德萊可素斯 米姆斯。

zh-hans.Great Moulton, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可格亞特 莫爾頓
zh-hans.South Mimms, Middlesex, England: 英国英格兰米德萊可素斯 米姆斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Henry Teyes是Henry Tyeys的儿子，于大约1180年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可格亞特 莫爾頓。他于1207年与Mrs. Isabel Tyeys在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1216年之后在英国英格兰米德萊可素斯 米姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Teyes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hayes
meanings: Irish (Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hAodha ‘descendant of Aodh’, a personal name meaning ‘fire’. Compare McCoy . In some cases especially in County Wexford, the surname is of English origin (see below), having been taken to Ireland by the Normans.
English: variant of Hay , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: topographic name from the plural form of Middle English hay(e), heye, heghe ‘enclosure’ (see Hay ), sometimes used as a collective noun for a farm, especially in Devon, where it is a frequent minor placename. Compare Hain .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: Henry Teyes was born about 1180, in Great Moulton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom as the son of Henry Tyeys. He married Mrs. Isabel Tyeys in 1207, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died after 1216, in South Mymms, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Henry Teyes est né environ 1180, à Great Moulton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Henry Tyeys. Il a épousé Mrs. Isabel Tyeys en 1207, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé après 1216, à South Mymms, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Henry Teyes è nato il circa 1180 nel Great Moulton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Henry Tyeys. Lui sposato Mrs. Isabel Tyeys nel 1207, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì dopo il 1216, nel South Mymms, Middlesex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Great Moulton, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト モウルトン
ja.South Mimms, Middlesex, England: イギリスイギリスミッドレセックスソウス ムインムズ
ja.lifeSummary: Henry Teyesは約1180年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグレアト モウルトンでHenry Tyeysの息子として生まれた。1207年にイギリスイギリスでMrs. Isabel Tyeysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1216年以後にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスソウス ムインムズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Teyes(은)는 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리트 모우턴에서 Henry Tyeys의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1207년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Mrs. Isabel Tyeys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1216년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 소우스 마이스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Henry Teyes nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Great Moulton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Henry Tyeys. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Isabel Tyeys em 1207, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu após 1216, em South Mymms, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Henry Teyes родился около 1180 г. в местности грит моултон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Henry Tyeys. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Isabel Tyeys в 1207 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер после 1216 г. в местности соут миммс, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания.
